import MystEditorGit from "./MystEditorGit.jsx"; import { createGitBackend } from "./stubGitBackend.js"; import { docsRoot, indexPath } from "./demo-data.js"; const usercolors = ["#30bced", "#60c771", "#e6aa3a", "#cbb63e", "#ee6352", "#9ac2c9", "#8acb88", "#14b2c4"]; const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search); const username = urlParams.get("username") || Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000).toString(); const color = usercolors[Math.floor(Math.random() * usercolors.length)]; let exampleCustomRoles = [ { target: "say", transform: async (content) => username + " says: '" + content + "'", }, ]; let exampleCustomDirectives = [ { target: "bold", transform: (_, data) => `${data.body}`, }, ]; let exampleTransforms = [ { // Other repo issue links target: /[0-9a-z\-]+\/[0-9a-z\-]+#\d{1,10}/g, transform: (match) => { const [repo, issueId] = match.split("#"); return `${match}`; }, }, { // Other repo PR links target: /[0-9a-z\-]+\/[0-9a-z\-]+\!\d+/g, transform: (match) => { const [repo, prid] = match.split("!"); return `${match}`; }, }, { // Same repo issue links target: /(^|(?<=\s))#\d+/g, transform: (match) => { const issueId = match.slice(1); return `${match}`; }, }, { // Same repo PR links target: /(^|(?<=\s))!\d+/g, transform: (match) => { const prid = match.slice(1); return `${match}`; }, }, { // User links target: /@[0-9a-z\-]+/g, transform: (match) => { const user = match.slice(1); return ` ${user} `; }, }, { target: /\|date\|/g, transform: (match) => new Promise((r) => r(new Date().toLocaleString("en-GB", { timeZone: "UTC" }))), }, ]; const collabEnabled = !(import.meta.env.VITE_COLLAB == "OFF") && urlParams.get("collab") != "false"; const collabUrl = import.meta.env.VITE_WS_URL ?? urlParams.get("collab_server"); // git_backend=stub (default). A future http backend can be selected here once implemented. const gitBackendKind = urlParams.get("git_backend") ?? "stub"; const { initialBranches, ...gitCallbacks } = createGitBackend(gitBackendKind, { repoKey: urlParams.get("repo") ?? "repos/myst", getBranch: () => window.myst_editor?.demo?.git?.branch?.value ?? "main", }); MystEditorGit( { repo: urlParams.get("repo") ?? "repos/myst", initialBranches, ...gitCallbacks, id: "demo", title: "[MyST Editor](https://github.com/antmicro/myst-editor/) demo", transforms: exampleTransforms, collaboration: { enabled: collabEnabled, commentsEnabled: collabEnabled, resolvingCommentsEnabled: collabEnabled, wsUrl: collabUrl ?? "#", username, color, mode: collabUrl ? "websocket" : "local", }, customRoles: exampleCustomRoles, customDirectives: exampleCustomDirectives, syncScroll: true, index: indexPath, docsRoot, }, document.getElementById("myst"), );
